docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,829.25 FILED BY GOODBALANCE AS TO DEFENDANT ATLAS TREE SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-09-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
